title: 3D Skellies x Fresh Animations
description: 3D Skeletons compatible with Fresh Animations by Fresh_LX!!
body: ### Try ->this version<- if you *don't* use Fresh Animations ## 3D Skellies FA Compat #### * Be sure this pack is *above* Fresh Animations!! Makes vanilla and Wither Skeletons, Skeleton Horses, Strays, and Bogged 3D!! (and compatible with FA!) ## Compatibility #### Requires EMF and ETF I've only tested this resource pack with a few versions to check compatibility, so if you test it with any version please let me know on discord if it works or breaks! That way I can fix bugs and add more versions. Thank you so much! ## Issues [![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49eac7d4916630c1ca7a85fe90f40e2363ae80eb.png)](https://discord.gg/W3T34eVScQ)
